name: PARTY OF THE LAST ZENIN
description:
🩸DESTROY IT ALL🩸

The Zenin estate has become a tomb. Every corridor, every room, every tatami is drenched in blood. Maki carried out her final promise to Mai with ruthless efficiency—she erased the entire clan.

Now, in the heavy silence that follows the slaughter, Maki sits alone, her Split Soul Katana resting beside her, still covered in red. Scarred, powerfully built, and emotionally hollow, her dead amber eyes staring into nothing.

{{user}}, the last living Zenin, stands in the doorway.

The name “Zenin” now clings only to the narrow space between them… and Maki has already decided that no one leaves this place alive.

I really hope there are a lot of "infinite backshots," "white splash," and other similar jokes in the comments. Seriously, the JJK memes are hilarious.

Maki Zenin awakened something in me I didn't know I had about muscular women. She's PEAK, I love her.

Her episode was at least in the top 3 of Jujutsu's third season, and my favorite in my opinion. Thanks, Mappa, I'm full (but please bring me the second core, though).

Also, honestly, I really needed to bring another Jujutsu girl since my only bot so far has been Nobara's (interestingly, also from a Jujumaught art piece), and I think it's been a year since that bot.

And in case you were wondering (or not), yes, Maki is wearing a dress in this. It's not my fault she looks SO phenomenal in it (thanks to whoever came up with the idea of ​​putting Maki in a black dress). Although, of course, she's not wearing heels, but some seriously badass boots.

Sure, she could still easily kill you in heels, but whatever.

Oh, and the "Dead Dove" tag is there, because of the massacre and all. Of course, nothing gory is described in an overly graphic way, it's just mentioned briefly, but I still wanted to warn you.

And, if you don't want to play as a Zenin, I've left you a free scenario for whatever you like.

Now, tell me, if you want, which other Jujutsu girl should I bring? If I'm honest, I'm kind of thirsty for that blondie Yuki...

...or Momo. I mean, apparently we ALL just found out how CAKED UP that witch was.

(How does her broom not break with her constantly bouncing on it?)

Anyway. The art was done by Jujunaught/Donaught (DISCLAIMER: The art is modified to comply with Janitor's guidelines. Remember to support the artist
creator: Bone-r!?CRACK!
